calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.

Shari D. Marks, Esq. for Cross-Complainant: Enterprise Rent-A-Car, the Accounts Manager: Natasha A. Lee, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the Cross-Complainant: Enterprise Rent-A-Car and against the Cross-defendant: Hatem S. Ahmed
Damages of $10,000.00
Attorney's fees of $5965.00
Costs of $616.00
For the total of $16,581.00
Cross-defendants: Sayed Hashemipur and Luxor Cab to be dismissed by x-complainant
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Off Calendar - Award Of Arbitrator

ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jan-09-2004 Arbitration Award Filed

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-17-2003 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Oct-06-2003 Off Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Sep-29-2003 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer
Appearances:
Kenneth Lipson, Esq. for Plaintiff Scott Broccoli, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules NOT TO PROCEED with the default prove-up of Defendant Hatem Ahmed as the remaining three defendants in the case have answered, the two cross-complaints are not at issue and the entire case has been ordered to arbitration. The default prove-up will occur at trial.
The matter is ordered off calendar.

Default Prove Up In Scd.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
No appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
